# Transcrição: 58. Trait 57 - Great Salespeople never lower their targets.

- **Fonte:** 58. Trait 57 - Great Salespeople never lower their targets.
- **Duração:** 01:16
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:16]

Great salespeople never lower their targets. Instead they increase their activity. When you're given a target either to yourself or by someone else, by corporate, by management, hey this is your target for the quarter. You're running a company, okay? Or your salesperson running a territory or your sales manager, the VP, whatever. Don't lower targets. Great salespeople don't lower targets. They'd rather raise their activity level, okay, than lower their target. This is how people end up with mediocrity. You grow up in life, you're 10 or 12 years old, and you got these high ambitions and then people start talking you into doing this. Okay good. Okay so now you're gonna meet this and you're still gonna be dissatisfied, right? Because your original target was way up here. Great people, great salespeople, great managers, great leaders don't lower targets. They would rather keep the target up here or even raise it, okay? Keep the target here and push the activity levels of the people underneath this to start getting close to it. Look even if you only get close and you don't reach that target, you're still better off than getting here. You're better off to not reach a high target than lower target and hit it, okay? Never lower your target. It's unethical and the greats know that.
